title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños to Donate the Following Vehicles Purchased by the Municipal Government : One (1) Unit Nissan Cargo Ambulance to Barangay Bayog; One (1) Unit Nissan Cargo Ambulance to Barangay Lalakay and One (1) Unit Nissan Cargo Ambulance to Barangay Maahas Thru Cost Sharing, the Municipal Share Chargeable Against the General Fund ? Supplemental Budget Amounting to Three Million Four Hundred Fifty Thousand P
